description: Install dependencies and verify the project builds successfully before making changes
steps: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/cse2100 && npm install` to install all dependencies
Run `npm run build` to verify the existing project compiles without errors
If there are TypeScript or build errors, note them but do not fix unrelated issues
acceptance_criteria: npm run build completes (or existing errors are documented)
verification: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/cse2100 && npm run build` and confirm exit code 0 or document pre-existing failures
findings: npm install completed successfully (554 packages, 23 vulnerabilities noted but not blocking). npm run build completed successfully in 7.75s with no TypeScript or Vite errors. Only warning is about chunk size (1370 kB main chunk) suggesting code-splitting, and a stale browserslist database. No pre-existing build failures.
